name: The Academy Is...
description:
'''The Academy Is...''' is an American [[Rock music|rock]] band from [[Chicago|Chicago, Illinois]], formed in 2003. They are associated with the [[Scene (subculture)|scene subculture]] by some publications.

Before temporarily disbanding, they were signed by the [[DCD2 Records|Decaydance]] imprint of the [[Fueled by Ramen]] label. They were originally known as "The Academy", but added the "Is..." in 2004 to avoid legal complications with other established bands already under that name. The band has released four studio albums: ''[[Almost Here (The Academy Is album)|Almost Here]]'' (2005), ''[[Santi (album)|Santi]]'' (2007), ''[[Fast Times at Barrington High]]'' (2008), and ''[[Almost There (The Academy Is... album)|Almost There]]'' (2026), along with four EPs. The band disbanded on October 8, 2011. In May 2015, the band briefly reunited to commemorate the 10th year anniversary of ''Almost Here'', performing a "farewell" show at [[Riot Fest]]. 

On May 11, 2022, The Academy Is... announced a full reunion, alongside a performance at that year's Riot Fest. The band released their first album in 18 years, ''Almost There'', in March 2026.
